AgeModifier_Description: Applies interpolators to particles based on their age over their lifetime
BoxFillProfile_Description: Randomly distributes particles throughout a rectangular area
BoxProfile_Description: Distributes particles along the edges of a rectangular boundary
BoxUniformProfile_Description: Distributes particles along the edges of a rectangular boundary with uniform density
CircleContainerModifier_Description: Constrains particles within or outside a circular boundary with bouncing effects
CircleContainerModifier_Property_Inside_: Indicates whether particles should be contained inside the circle
CircleContainerModifier_Property_Radius_: The radius of the circular container
CircleContainerModifier_Property_Restitu: The coefficient of restitution (bounciness) for particle collisions with the boundary
CircleProfile_Description: Distributes particles throughout a circular area with controllable radiation patterns
CircleRadiation_In_Description: Particles move toward the center of the circle
CircleRadiation_None_Description: Particles move in random directions unrelated to their positions
CircleRadiation_Out_Description: Particles move away from the center of the circle
ColorInterpolator_Description: Gradually changes all color components (hue, saturation, lightness) of particles over their lifetime.
DragModifier_Description: Applies fluid resistance to particles, gradually reducing their velocity over time
DragModifier_Property_Density_Descriptio: The density of the fluid medium, affecting the strength of the drag force
DragModifier_Property_DragCoefficient_De: The drag coefficient, representing the aerodynamic or hydrodynamic properties of particles
HueInterpolator_Description: Changes only the hue component of particle colors while preserving saturation and lightness
HueInterpolator_Property_EndValue_Descri: Final hue value (0.0 = red, 0.33 = green, 0.66 = blue, 1.0 = red)
HueInterpolator_Property_StartValue_Desc: Initial hue value (0.0 = red, 0.33 = green, 0.66 = blue, 1.0 = red)
LinearGravityModifier_Description: Applies a constant directional force to particles, simulating gravity or wind
LinearGravityModifier_Property_Direction: The direction vector of the gravitational force
LinearGravityModifier_Property_Strength_: The strength of the gravitational force, in units per second squared
LineProfile_Description: Distributes particles uniformly along a line segment with random headings
Message_FileAlreadyExists:
The project directory already has a file named '{0}'
Would you like to replace it?
Message_ModifierDoesNotSupportInterpolat: Modifier type '{0}' does not support interpolators
Message_UnsavedChanges:
You have unsaved changes!
Would you like to save before exiting?
Modifier_Property_Frequency_Description: How often, in times per second, the modifier attempts to update the particle buffer
OpacityFastFadeModifier_Description: Rapidly decreases particle opacity based on their age, creating a linear fade-out effect
OpacityInterpolator_Description: Gradually changes particle transparency from completely transparent to opaque
ParticleEffect_Property_AutoTrigger_Desc: Indicates whether this particle effect will automatically trigger its emitters
ParticleEffect_Property_AutoTriggerFrequ: The frequency, in seconds, at which this particle effect automatically triggers emitters
ParticleEmitter_Property_Capacity_Descri: The maximum number of particles that this emitter can have active at a given time
ParticleEmitter_Property_Lifespan_Descri: The amount of time, in seconds, that each particle released from this emitter will live
ParticleEmitter_Property_Name_Descriptio: The display name of the currently selected particle emitter
ParticleEmitter_Property_RenderingOrder_:
The order in which the particles are rendered

- Front To Back: Particles are rendered in front to back order
- Back To Front: Particles are rendered in back to front order.
ParticleEmitter_Property_Texture_Descrip: The texture used for the currently selected particle emitter
ParticleValueKind_Constant_Description: All particles will be released with the same value for this property
ParticleValueKind_Random_Description: Each particle will be released with a unique random value within the defined minimum and maximum bounds
PointProfile_Description: Emits all particles from a single point with random headings
Profile_Description: Profiles define the emission pattern, such as points, lines, rings, or areas from which particles originate
RectangleContainerModifier_Description: Constrains particles within a rectangular boundary with bouncing effects
RectangleContainerModifier_Property_Heig: The height of the rectangular container
RectangleContainerModifier_Property_Rest: The coefficient of restitution (bounciness) for particle collisions with the boundary
RectangleContainerModifier_Property_Widt: The width of the rectangular container
RectangleLoopContainerModifier_Descripti: Wraps particles to the opposite side when they exit a rectangular boundary
RectangleLoopContainerModifier_Property_: The height of the rectangular container
The width of the rectangular container
ReleaseParameter_Color_Description: The color of particles in HSL format
ReleaseParameter_Mass_Description: The mass of particles (affects physics interactions
ReleaseParameter_Opacity_Description: The transparency of particles (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = opaque)
ReleaseParameter_Quantity_Description: The number of particles released per emission
ReleaseParameter_Rotation_Description: The initial rotation angle of particles in radians
ReleaseParameter_Speed_Description: The initial speed of particles when released
RenderingOrder_BackToFront_Description: Particles are rendered from back to front
RenderingOrder_FrontToBack_Description: Particles are rendered from front to back
RingProfile_Description: Distributes particles along the perimeter of a circle with controllable radiation patterns
RotationInterpolator_Description: Gradually changes the rotation angle of particles over their lifetime
RotationModifier_Description: Applies a constant rotational velocity to particles over time
RotationModifier_Property_RotationRate_D: The rate at which particles rotate, in radians per second
ScaleInterpolator_Description: Gradually changes the size of particles by scaling their width and height
ScaleInterpolator_Property_EndValue_Desc: Final particle size multiplier (1.0 = original size)
ScaleInterpolator_Property_StartValue_De: Initial particle size multiplier (1.0 = original size)
SprayProfile_Description: Emits particles from a single point in a directional cone pattern
VelocityColorModifier_Description: Changes particle colors dynamically based on their movement speed
VelocityColorModifier_Property_Stationar: The color for particles that are stationary or moving slowly
VelocityColorModifier_Property_VelocityC: The color for particles that have reached or exceeded the velocity threshold
VelocityColorModifier_Property_VelocityT: The velocity magnitude at which particles reach the maximum interpolation effect
VelocityInterpolator_Description: Gradually changes the velocity vector of particles, affecting their movement direction and speed
VelocityInterpolator_Property_EndValue_D: Final velocity vector in units per second (X, Y)
VelocityInterpolator_Property_StartValue: Initial velocity vector in units per second (X, Y)
VelocityModifier_Description: Applies interpolators to particles based on their velocity magnitude
VelocityModifier_Property_VelocityThresh: The velocity magnitude at which particles reach the maximum interpolation effect
VortexModifier_Description: Creates a gravitational vortex effect, pulling particles toward a central point
VortexModifier_Property_Mass_Description: The mass of the vortex center
VortexModifier_Property_MaxSpeed_Descrip: The maximum speed that the vortex can impart on particles
VortexModifier_Property_Position_Descrip: The center position of the vortex in 2D space
